case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ARMANDO CAMPOS VASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-21-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, ARMANDO CAMPOS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO JAN-14-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES THAT PROVIDED A WORKING PHONE NUMBER HAVE BEEN ADVISE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, ARMANDO CAMPOS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
